strengths: All 4 intent types verified end-to-end through the service layer with mocked classifyFollowUpIntent dep: ASK (service.test.ts:732-819), NEW_DIRECTION (821-864), OFF_TOPIC (866-912), REFINE (914-969).

SSE streaming with __notfirst__ slug asserted for streaming intents (ASK at 791-798, REFINE at 951-957) and explicitly asserted ABSENT for non-streaming intents (NEW_DIRECTION filters token calls to length 0 at 859-863; OFF_TOPIC asserts publishEvent not called at 903).
Conversation storage verified for both user and assistant roles (ASK at 800-814; OFF_TOPIC asserts insertConversation called exactly twice at 905-911).
ASK test asserts classifyFollowUpIntent receives full context (originalIntent, artifact content, history array, message) at 775-789 — not a vacuous mock check.
All 58 tests in the file pass; SHA range is scoped to the single test file (+241 lines), no implementation or out-of-scope changes.

issues.description: NEW_DIRECTION test name says 'return confirmation with button metadata' but assertions only check pendingRegenerate: true and the regenerate explanation string — no literal button metadata fields are asserted. Cosmetic naming mismatch; behavior matches the DELIVERABLE.
